Paragraph

For any \(1\le p < \infty\text{,}\) let \(L^{p}[a, b]\) denote the completion of \(C[a, b]\) under the norm \(\Vert f \Vert_{L^{p}[a, b]} :=\left( \int_{a}^{b} |f(x)|^{p}\, dx\right)^{1/p}\text{.}\) From the abstract completion process, each element \(\phi\in L^{p}[a, b]\) is an equivalence class of Cauchy sequences \(\{ c_{k}\}\) in \(C[a, b]\) under the \(L^{p}[a, b]\)-norm. We would like to address the following questions
in-context
